  • Interfaces
    Class
    Description
    LifecycleEvent
    Base type for all Lifecycle Events.
    LifecycleEventManager<O extends LifecycleEventOwner>
    Manages a plugin's lifecycle events.
    LifecycleEventOwner
    Implemented by types that are considered owners of registered handlers for lifecycle events.
